name: Sort By
description: Sorts the entire DataFrame by one or multiple columns with full control over ascending/descending order per column. Essential for ranked reports, leaderboards, time-series ordering, and preparing data for window functions or exports.

fields.name: sortByColNames
fields.title: Columns
fields.description: Select one or more columns to sort by. Drag to reorder - the top column is the primary sort key, followed by secondary, tertiary, etc.

fields.name: ascDesc
fields.title: Sorting Order
fields.description: Individually set ASC (ascending) or DESC (descending) for each selected column. Example: Salary - DESC, then Department - ASC, then Name - ASC
